title: The Winter King Keeps No Promises
description: Every solstice the Winter Court takes one mortal singer to perform at its midnight ball, and every solstice that singer comes home changed, or does not come home at all. This year the lot falls to Lark, who has no intention of being charmed, frightened, or kept. The Winter King has other plans — and so, infuriatingly, does his court. Romantasy of cold courts and warmer dangers.
